title: rhamnus alaternus var. glabra
intro: Rhamnus alaternus var. glabra, also known as Smooth Buckthorn, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its astringent, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and prevent infections. The health benefits of Smooth Buckthorn include its ability to support the immune system, reduce oxidative stress, and promote overall well-being. Smooth Buckthorn is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in skincare products due to its antioxidant and anti-aging properties.
